name: Stickman Fighting 2 Player
description: Stickman Fighting 2 Player! A fun, addictive and Multiplayer warriors with realistic Ragdoll physics games. Test your warrior games skill and kill the enemy until the last drop of your blood! An epic Shadow 2 player games. You’ll get the heroic western cowboy fight with full of action and speed. Put your reflex and kill your opponents! real Boxing games, punches, catches, and Kicks! Stickman fighter physics games! Experience realistic Ninja fighting games atmosphere in the best Stickman games with ragdoll Doodle style survival games. Instructions: 1 player - Arrows 2 player - WASD
tags: 1 Player, 2 Player, Action, Boxing, Boys, Fight, Fighting, HTML5, Physics, WebGL
